features.title: Goal-Space Creation UI
features.description: Allow an authenticated user to create a goal space from the existing /goal-spaces page using the existing goal-space API.
acceptance_criteria: Feature only creates goal spaces from the existing /goal-spaces page.
No P3-03 node-board UI is added.
No backend, API, database, schema, migration, or authorization changes are made.
Form exposes accessible labels exactly Goal name and Description.
Idle submit button text is exactly Create goal space.
Successful submit posts JSON to /api/v1/goal-spaces with method POST and credentials include.
Request body includes name, description, constraints: [], and acceptance_criteria: [].
Successful submit resets the form and calls router.refresh().
API envelope error renders the envelope error message and does not refresh.
Thrown fetch error renders Unable to create goal space.
UI uses design tokens/CSS variables with no hardcoded hex or tracking/letter-spacing classes in P3-02 files.
test_needs: Focused UI component test for success
Focused UI component test for API envelope error
Focused UI component test for thrown fetch error if small
Requested lint, typecheck, format, and diff checks
definition_of_done: Required tests pass or documented exceptions are recorded
Required verification matrix items pass or have documented exceptions
